meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Escape Tutorial Hell for Founders
content.seo_description: Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-ready SaaS apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a revenue killer. You escape it by shifting from passive consumption to active, AI-assisted development. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a force multiplier, allowing you to build, debug, and iterate on actual product features instead of following endless, outdated video guides.
content.intro:
The screen glows with another 'Build a To-Do List' tutorial, but your real-world SaaS idea remains trapped in your head. You are drowning in syntax, chasing dopamine hits from completed videos while your market window closes. The gap between knowing how to code and actually shipping a product is where most founders fail.

It is time to stop being a student and start being an architect. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from learning the language to orchestrating a machine that builds for you. This isn't just about writing code; it's about compressing your development lifecycle from months to days.

steps.title: Initialize the Project Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean, modular foundation for your MVP to ensure that Claude Code can parse your directory architecture efficiently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea for [Insert Idea] and generate a file structure that is lean, scalable, and optimized for rapid deployment.

steps.title: Map Your Core Value Proposition
steps.description: Define your MVP features clearly so the AI understands the business context before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical spec document for an MVP focusing on [Key Feature]. Define the database schema and API endpoints required.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate database schema for the defined MVP features'

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write functional modules based on your Antigravity-generated specs, keeping the focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, documented function for [Feature] handling user authentication and data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'implement the authentication module using the provided schema'

steps.title: Iterative Debugging and Refactoring
steps.description: Don't fix bugs manually. Feed the stack trace into Claude Code to identify the root cause and apply industry-standard patches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this error log: [Paste Log]. Suggest a fix that adheres to clean code principles and prevents future regressions.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Ensure your production environment is secure and optimized for real user traffic before you push to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit of the current codebase. Identify any bottlenecks that could prevent scaling to 1,000 users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'optimize for production deployment and check for security vulnerabilities'

pro_tips: Treat your codebase like a product: modularize early to avoid 'spaghetti AI' code that becomes impossible to maintain later.
Always provide the 'Business Why' in your prompts; Claude writes better code when it understands the user's ultimate goal.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for every feature; this acts as a safety net when the AI suggests complex refactors.
Maintain a 'Context File' that summarizes your project's current state and technical constraints to keep the AI aligned during long sessions.
Stop at 80% completion for non-critical features; focus your manual energy on the 20% that provides unique value to your customers.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to a staging environment, conduct a smoke test, and begin user acquisition immediately. Do not wait for perfection.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the blueprint to stop learning and start earning. Stop building for the sake of the craft, and start building for the sake of your business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
